title: IMS LDI — PCB Manufacturing Fleet
description: Laser Direct Imaging Command Center. 15 panels: Executive KPI, Process Control, Performance AIOps, Alarm Triage. Data sourced exclusively from ldi_data, ldi_alarm_log, and ldi_alarm_ms_code.

list.name: machine_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT eqp_id AS __text FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY eqp_id
list.label: Machine

panels.title: Fleet Uptime Status

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT eqp_id) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND state = true

panels.description: Count of LDI machines reporting state = true (online). Green if > 0, Red if 0.

panels.title: Active Production Jobs

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (eqp_id) eqp_id AS "Machine", mo AS "MO", layer_name AS "Layer", total_time AS "Cycle Time (s)", total_board AS "Boards", time AS "Last Seen" FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY eqp_id, time DESC

panels.description: Latest active production job per LDI machine. Shows current MO, layer, and cycle time.

panels.title: Cleanroom Temperature

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(temperature::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND temperature IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Latest cleanroom temperature. Target: 22°C. Green: 20-24°C. Red: outside range.

panels.title: Cleanroom Humidity

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(humidity::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND humidity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Latest cleanroom humidity. Target: 55%. Green: 50-60%. Red: outside range.

panels.title: Thermal Drift Map

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, eqp_id AS metric, ROUND(AVG(temperature)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Temperature" FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND temperature IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Temperature per machine over time. Green band: 20-24°C. Red outside range.

panels.title: Humidity Drift Map

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, eqp_id AS metric, ROUND(AVG(humidity)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Humidity" FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND humidity IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Humidity per machine over time. Green band: 50-60%. Red outside range.

panels.title: Resist Dosage vs Scan Speed

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, eqp_id || ' - Resist' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(resist_dosage)::NUMERIC, 2) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND resist_dosage IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, eqp_id || ' - Speed' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(scan_speed)::NUMERIC, 2) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND scan_speed IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Resist dosage and scan speed per machine. Correlates dosage application with scan velocity.

panels.title: Vacuum & Thickness Matrix

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, eqp_id || ' - Vacuum' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(air_vacuum)::NUMERIC, 2) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND air_vacuum IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, eqp_id || ' - Thickness' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(thickness)::NUMERIC, 3) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND thickness IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Vacuum pressure and film thickness per machine. Correlates vacuum control with physical measurements.

panels.title: PE Radar

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'PE1' AS metric, ROUND(pe_1::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND pe_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'PE2', ROUND(pe_2::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND pe_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'PE3', ROUND(pe_3::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND pe_3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'PE4', ROUND(pe_4::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND pe_4 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'PE5', ROUND(pe_5::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND pe_5 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'PE6', ROUND(pe_6::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND pe_6 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Process Efficiency PE1-PE6 vs PE setting threshold. Red < 70%, Amber 70-85%, Green > 85%.

panels.title: JE Radar

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'JE1' AS metric, ROUND(je_1::NUMERIC, 1) AS value FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND je_1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'JE2', ROUND(je_2::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND je_2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'JE3', ROUND(je_3::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND je_3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'JE4', ROUND(je_4::NUMERIC, 1) FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND je_4 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Junction Efficiency JE1-JE4. Red < 70%, Amber 70-85%, Green > 85%.

panels.title: Cycle Time Efficiency

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, eqp_id AS metric, ROUND(AVG(total_time / NULLIF(total_board, 0))::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Cycle Time" FROM public.ldi_data WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND total_board > 0 GROUP BY time, eqp_id ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Cycle time per board. Rising trend = machines slowing down.

panels.title: Temperature Z-Score Anomaly

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT eqp_id, AVG(temperature) AS mu, STDDEV(temperature) AS sigma FROM public.ldi_data WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND temperature IS NOT NULL GROUP BY eqp_id) SELECT d.time, d.eqp_id AS metric, ROUND((d.temperature - s.mu) / NULLIF(s.sigma, 0)::NUMERIC, 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM public.ldi_data d JOIN stats s ON d.eqp_id = s.eqp_id WHERE d.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND d.eqp_id IN (${machine_id:singlequote}) AND d.temperature IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.time ASC

panels.description: 3-sigma Z-Score for temperature anomaly. Green: -2 to +2. Amber: +/-2.5. Red: +/-3+.

panels.title: Critical Alarm Stream

targets.rawSql: SELECT a.logdate AS "Time", a.equipmentid AS "Equipment", COALESCE(m.alarm_msg, a.errorcode::TEXT) AS "Alarm Message", COALESCE(m.alarm_type, 'UNKNOWN') AS "Type" FROM public.ldi_alarm_log a LEFT JOIN public.ldi_alarm_ms_code m ON a.errorcode = m.alarm_code WHERE a.logdate > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY a.logdate DESC LIMIT 20

panels.description: Latest 20 alarms with message lookup from ldi_alarm_ms_code.

panels.title: Top 5 Recurring Alarms

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(m.alarm_msg, a.errorcode::TEXT) AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.ldi_alarm_log a LEFT JOIN public.ldi_alarm_ms_code m ON a.errorcode = m.alarm_code WHERE a.logdate > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5

panels.description: Top 5 most frequent alarm messages in the last 24 hours.

panels.title: Equipment Fault Frequency

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', a.logdate) AS time, a.equipmentid AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM public.ldi_alarm_log a WHERE a.logdate > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Alarm frequency heatmap: X=time (1h buckets), Y=equipment, Heat=count. Shows WHEN and WHERE fleet degrades.
